Star Wars Cards is a Card game played out in 3 arenas as the Light Side vs the Dark Side

# Arenas

The 3 arenas are Space, Ground, Character are played in the order.

# Phases

The Game starts with a Set Up phase. Then you move to the first Build Phase, then a battle phase. You continue to do Build -> Battle phase until a person Controls 2 arenas.

## Setup Phase

In double battles you are given 60 build points, in singles 30. The dark side starts. You go back and forth building only units (not missions, location, equipment, or location) cards. You can build in any arena
